reason: page-agent@1.12.1 does not expose a usable non-demo browser bundle for static HTML integration. dist/esm/page-agent.js (722 B) re-exports from @page-agent/* packages requiring a bundler and npm dependencies. dist/iife/page-agent.demo.js (209 KB) is a demo-only bundle with auto-init, free testing API (DashScope), and jsDelivr CDN references — excluded per experiment policy.
